style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, drawn as three equal panels side by side. Left panel titled WARRIOR with a simple shield icon, listing SHIP, SPEED, LEADERBOARD, and a small tag at its base reading AI FACTORY. Centre panel titled WIZARD with a simple stars icon, listing STRATEGIZE, MODERNIZE, ARCHITECT, with a base tag reading GOVERNMENT 3.0. Right panel titled CRAFTSPERSON with a simple hammer icon, listing BUILD FOR OTHERS, HARNESSES, TEMPLATES, with a base tag reading PRONGHORN, NEXUS, VELOCITY. The three panels are balanced and equal in weight. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people.
